text: Communication with other Nx_Ports shall not be attempted until the Fabric Login procedure is complete.

evidence_refs.quote: with other Nx_Ports shall not be attempted until the Fabric Login procedure is complete.

text: The Nx_Port shall transmit the FLOGI in a new Exchange.

evidence_refs.quote: The Nx_Port shall transmit the FLOGI in a new Exchange.

text: The FLOGI payload contains the Service Parameters of the Nx_Port.

evidence_refs.quote: The Payload of FLOGI contains the Ser-
vice Parameters of the Nx_Port, a 64-bit N_Port_Name of the Nx_Port, and a 64-bit Node_Name.

text: The FLOGI payload contains a 64-bit Node_Name.

text: The Service Parameters for FLOGI are as specified for F_Port Login in 6.6.

evidence_refs.quote: The Service Parameters are as specified for F_Port Login in 6.6.

text: The applicability of Service Parameters to Fabric Login is given in tables 150 and 155.

evidence_refs.quote: The Service Parameters are as specified for F_Port Login in 6.6.  The applicability of the Service Pa-
rameters to Fabric Login are given in tables 150 and 155.

text: Table 150 includes a FLOGI Parameter applicability column.
Table 150 includes a FLOGI LS_ACC Parameter applicability column.
In Table 150, Buffer-to-buffer Credit is applicable to FLOGI for Classes 1, 2, and 3.
In Table 150, Buffer-to-buffer Credit is applicable to FLOGI LS_ACC for Classes 1, 2, and 3.
Table 155 includes a FLOGI Parameter applicability column.
Table 155 includes a FLOGI LS_ACC Parameter applicability column.
In Table 155, Class Validity is applicable to FLOGI for Classes 1, 2, and 3.
In Table 155, Class Validity is applicable to FLOGI LS_ACC for Classes 1, 2, and 3.

text: The Nx_Port shall set the D_ID to the well-known F_Port address FFFFFEh.

evidence_refs.quote: set the D_ID to the well-known F_Port address (i.e., FFFFFEh).

text: If the Nx_Port is unidentified, it shall set the S_ID in the FLOGI to 000000h or 0000h || YY.

evidence_refs.quote: If the Nx_Port is unidentified, an Nx_Port shall set the S_ID in the FLOGI to 000000h or 0000h || YY.

text: If the Nx_Port sets the S_ID to 000000h, it is requesting that the Fabric assign all 24 bits of the N_Port_ID.

evidence_refs.quote: If the Nx_Port sets the S_ID to 000000h, the Nx_Port is requesting the Fabric assign all 24 bits of the

text: If the Nx_Port sets the S_ID to 0000h || YY, it is requesting that the Fabric assign the upper 16 bits, bits 23 to 8, of the N_Port_ID.

evidence_refs.quote: If the Nx_Port sets the S_ID to 0000h || YY, the Nx_Port is requesting the Fabric assign
the upper 16 bits, bits 23 to 8, and validate the lower 8 bits, bits 7 to 0, of the N_Port_ID.

text: If the Nx_Port sets the S_ID to 0000h || YY, it is requesting that the Fabric validate the lower 8 bits, bits 7 to 0, of the N_Port_ID.

evidence_refs.quote: the upper 16 bits, bits 23 to 8, and validate the lower 8 bits, bits 7 to 0, of the N_Port_ID.
